eras.title: Enterprise Foundation
eras.subtitle: Production-Grade Depth and Security
eras.description: Established enterprise-level foundation with comprehensive accessibility, error handling, security hardening, and production infrastructure. Added multi-tenant architecture, AI agents, and mobile optimization across all features.

changes.text: Added enterprise depth to all views with skeletons, error handling, accessibility, and validation
Implemented multi-tenant schema with organizations, team memberships, and RLS policies
Added n8n workflow definitions for scheduled data synchronization
Built contact enrichment pipeline with Clay MCP integration and AI research
Added deal scoring, follow-up automation, and pipeline forecasting features
Implemented document upload to Supabase Storage with drag-drop interface
Created learning dashboard with golden examples and pattern visualization
Added Overnight Agent workflow for autonomous Claude code execution
Optimized mobile experience with responsive breakpoints and touch targets
Hardened security with prompt injection protection and input validation
Added comprehensive test suite with 337 new API and executor tests
Integrated CodeQL, Semgrep, and SonarCloud for automated quality assurance
Refactored large components into smaller, maintainable modules

eras.title: Production Summit
eras.subtitle: Enterprise Launch Preparation Complete
eras.description: The expedition reached production readiness through systematic auditing and hardening. Mobile capabilities were established across all major routes, while sync reliability and monitoring systems were fortified for enterprise deployment.

changes.text: Migrated raw localStorage to centralized storage.js with comprehensive test coverage
Completed 4-phase production audit roadmap covering critical fixes, architecture improvements, hardening, and scale preparation
Implemented 5-phase mobile experience covering performance foundations, navigation, Task Manager views, consulting portal, and progressive enhancements
Built sync reliability foundation with auth-aware consulting, health recording, source tracking, and failure indicators
Added code quality dashboard with magic link authentication and restricted public signup
Implemented password recovery flow with dedicated update interface
Added comprehensive LLM call logging for all Claude API interactions
Built provider abstraction layer in anthropic client architecture
Enhanced financial widget with Monarch sync status indicators
Added manual sync capability to consulting portal interface
Resolved enterprise authentication errors, client detail wiring, and task empty states
Fixed sync source key mismatches, threshold handling, and error recovery
Updated design system for accessibility compliance and specification alignment
Applied frontend design polish addressing 5 items from competitive analysis
Adjusted task processing schedule to daily execution for Hobby plan compliance

eras.title: Stability Nexus
eras.subtitle: Core System Hardening Phase
eras.description: Basecamp stabilization effort focused on eliminating crashes and strengthening data integrity systems. The expedition consolidated scattered roadmaps and reinforced critical UI components against failure.

changes.text: Resolved react-window virtualization crashes across tasks and contacts tables through API downgrade and proper configuration
Strengthened data integrity audit system with improved error handling and sync reliability safeguards
Fixed contacts synchronization issues by normalizing Notion values and adding protective sync barriers
Consolidated scattered roadmap documentation into unified ROADMAP.md with dedicated route
Implemented provider-agnostic AI layer with production risk mitigations
Added flywheel trust-level enforcement with 30-day rolling window validation
Merged registry documentation with Supabase docs and enhanced visibility with executive briefs
Streamlined Overview and Net Worth tabs into unified interface with health score as status indicator
Resolved task page crashes from corrupted localStorage with improved error boundaries

eras.title: Architecture Ascent
eras.subtitle: System Consolidation and Enhancement
eras.description: A comprehensive restructuring expedition that streamlined the command architecture from 35 to 14 operations while establishing a robust three-agent system. The team fortified the codebase with extensive testing coverage and enhanced user interfaces with interactive visualizations.

changes.text: Implemented three-agent architecture with command consolidation reducing operations from 35 to 14
Migrated six core operations to unified handler.js wrapper system
Added relationship heatmap cards with visual encoding for contact health status
Built interactive stats banner for contacts directory navigation
Replaced stacked filter pills with compact filter bar design
Created rich detail flyout with activity timeline and strength ring visualization
Added micro-interaction layer with view crossfade and keyboard navigation
Established comprehensive component test coverage for UI interactions and financial health workflows
Centralized executor configuration with unified model parameters across AI operations
Extracted shared document components for improved code reusability
Optimized bundle size with lazy-loaded components reducing main chunk by 49 KB

eras.title: Design Convergence
eras.subtitle: Typography and AI Integration
eras.description: The expedition reached a critical convergence point where visual consistency met intelligent functionality. Over eleven intensive sprints, the team established unified typography standards across the entire platform while resolving key AI infrastructure challenges.

changes.text: Implemented comprehensive UI/UX campaign across eleven sprints with type scale standardization and layout overhaul
Enforced site-wide typography consistency across all components and interfaces
Corrected type scale alignment issues across AI components affecting 45 violations in 12 files
Resolved critical AI feature blockers including chat user identification and content enrichment chunking

eras.title: Action Polish
eras.subtitle: Interface Refinement and Response Optimization
eras.description: The team refined the Quick Actions system with immediate visual feedback and optimistic UI patterns, while expanding activity tracking capabilities. Essential infrastructure fixes ensured proper data handling and backend processing reliability.

changes.text: Implemented persistent dispatch indicators and optimistic UI feedback for Quick Action buttons
Added expandable activity log interface with TopBar completion badge
Enhanced task progress display with completion toast notifications
Fixed timestamp column references for deal scores and activity summaries
Enabled AI features by default and resolved LaunchDarkly SDK initialization
Fixed task queue RLS compliance by including user ID in database inserts
Improved backend processing to trigger immediately after task dispatch
Updated test mocks for task queue context integration
Disabled resource-intensive CI workflows to reduce noise

eras.title: Migration Traverse
eras.subtitle: Platform Migration and Quality Restoration
eras.description: Completed a major platform migration to Cloudflare Pages while simultaneously fixing AI inference issues and achieving zero test failures. This era established hybrid hosting architecture and restored system reliability.

changes.text: Migrated entire platform to Cloudflare Pages with hybrid hosting configuration keeping Notion on Vercel
Ported all 9 endpoints and cron worker to new Cloudflare infrastructure
Fixed LM Studio MLX inference integration and resolved 5 broken AI executors
Improved LM Studio provider to handle qwen3 thinking tokens and reasoning effort parameters
Resolved all 43 pre-existing test failures achieving zero failure state
Updated documentation for hybrid hosting architecture and milestone completion

eras.title: Intelligence Awakening
eras.subtitle: AI Learning and Automation Infrastructure
eras.description: The team established sophisticated AI learning mechanisms and enterprise automation pipelines. Critical security vulnerabilities were eliminated while building robust rejection feedback systems and MS365 intelligence layers.

changes.text: Built flywheel learning system with rejection reasons and AI suggestion feedback
Deployed n8n MS365 automation with architect hardening
Created email backfill and local AI distillation pipeline
Added Cloudflare Pages auto-deployment on main branch pushes
Enhanced consulting CRM with last contact tracking data pipelines
Fixed email watcher to fetch all recent emails instead of only unread
Resolved all six Dependabot security vulnerabilities
Cleaned up dead code and optimized development shims
